title: Hylaeaicum pendulum

It is native to the Himalayan region and is often found growing in mountainous areas. This plant belongs to the genus Hylaeaicum, which consists of several species of bearded irises. The species Hylaeaicum pendulum is further divided into two subspecies, making it a unique and diverse species. Its classification places it among the perennials, characterized by its rhizomatous growth habit.
